purpose: Require a trust signature on every meaningful lane surface before release can advance.
rules: Every Gemini Flash lane response must carry a surface signature.
Every Gemini Flash lane receipt must carry a surface signature or an explicit blocked reason for its absence.
The run ledger must tie each lane signature to the dispatch, response, receipt, and next handoff.
No release packet may be approved if any required lane signature is missing.
blockedConditions: signature does not match the lane artifact hash
signature claims a worker runtime that is not Gemini Flash
